items.title: Convention runner strict gate passes
items.precondition: Run from /Users/rustinedave/Desktop/alloro after remediation changes are applied.
items.expected: The command exits 0 with no runtime files over 800 lines, no backend console.* files, no db() outside models, no frontend raw fetch/axios bypasses, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, no JWT/token reads outside the API client, no knex .raw( outside models, and no frontend import-boundary breaches.
items.evidence: Passed locally on 2026-06-26. Remaining §11.7 tenant-scope model rows are heuristic/manual-review advisory items.

items.title: Backend TypeScript and tests pass
items.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit exited 0. npm test passed 14 files and 69 tests.

items.title: Frontend build and quiet lint pass
items.expected: The frontend production build exits 0 and quiet lint exits 0.
items.evidence: Frontend build passed with existing Vite warnings. Quiet frontend lint exited 0.

items.title: Dependency cruise has no new app database-layer warning
items.expected: The command exits 0. The prior src/app.ts -> src/database/connection.ts warning is gone.
items.evidence: npm run depcruise exited 0 with 32 remaining existing warnings; src/app.ts no longer appears in the warning list.
